titleStmt.title: SII 17.725: original edition by K. G. Krishnan
No. 725. (A.R. No. 668 of 1904.) TIRUMULLAIVĀYAL, SAIDAPET TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the south wall of the central shrine in the Māśilāmaṇīśvara temple.
The cyclic year cited in the record, i.e., Pārthiva fell in Saka 1327. The details of date, viz., Pārthiva, Māśi 1 probably correspond to 1406 A.D., January 26.

This records the gift of 800 kuḻi of land in Veḷḷāṉūr by Ayyaluppa Kaḍaiyār, son of Payiṇḍi-Arāśar, to the temple of Tirumullaivāyil-uḍaiya Nāyanār in Kāṉappēṟūrnāḍu, in Puḻaṟ-kōṭṭam, for the service of tiruppaḷḷi-eḻuchchi. The gift land is stated to have been formerly granted to the donor by Vīranārāyaṇaṉ [Iṉa]kku nalla perumāḷ alias Oṟṟi Araśar, on the occasion of a solar eclipse. The inscription also mentions the measuring rod Aśaṅgādagaṇḍaṉ kōl. Vide No. 693 above.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . śrīmanmāhāmaṇḍalīśvara rājādhirāja parameśvara śrīviraprathāpabukkarāyaṟkkuc cellāniṉṟa pārtthivvarṣam mācimātam mutal tiyati puḻaṟ
kkoṭṭattuk kāṉappeṟūr nāṭṭu Uṭaiyār tirumullaivāyil Uṭaiya ṉāyināṟkku Āpa stambhasūtrattil kālabhavagotrattil payiṇḍi Aracar makanā
r Ayyaluppa kaṭaiyār Iṉṉāyanāṟkku tiruppaḷḷieḻiccikku Amutupaṭikku nāḷ Oṉṟukku Eṭṭu nāḻikkā(l)lāl Arici Aññāḻi Āka varuṣa
ma Oṉṟukku mātam paṉṉiraṇṭukku Arici Irupatiṉ kalattukku Añcil Iraṇṭu paṭikku kuṭukkum nellu Aiyampatiṉ kalam Iṉ
ṉellu Aiyampatiṉ kalattukku vīranārāyaṇaṉ Iṉakku nalla perumāḷāṉa Oṟṟi Aracar namakku somagrahaṇa puṇṇiya kālattile tammuṭaiya kāṇi Āṭ(c)ci
āṉa veḷḷāṉūrile muṉṉāḷc ciyaṉāyaṉār Āṉa Oṟṟi Aracar viṭṭa tiruviḷakkuppaṭṭikkut teṟkku namakku Utaka pūṟuvam Āka viṭappaṭṭa viṟutti Acaṅkātakaṇṭaṉ ko
lālk kuḻi Eṇṇūṟum Iṉṉāyaṉārkkut tiruppaḷḷieḻuccikku A(m)mutupaṭikku Iṉṉilam Eṇṇūṟu kuḻiyum cantirātittavaraiyum cel(la)
vatāka Iṉṉilattile tiruccūlattāpanam(ma) paṇṇit tirumalaiyile cilālekam paṇṇik kuṭuttom ..text to be Inserted
text to be Inserted
[text to be Inserted
Digital edition of SII 17.725 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
